nodes.label: AI as time-saving problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: I bring the problems that I'm stuck on and I'm in a crunch of time to find the solution

nodes.label: AI as collaborative solution refiner
nodes.grounding_span: I explain the problem extensively. I sometimes explain my solution approach to get refined

nodes.label: AI output authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: it sounds so rigid and robotic no matter what I do so I prefer to write my own emails

nodes.label: AI reliability for niche problems
nodes.grounding_span: I usually feel more frustrated than satisfied when using AI at work to solve a niche problem

nodes.label: AI as last resort in problem-solving
nodes.label_negative: AI as first resort in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I did learn to turn to AI as a last resort in the process of problem-solving

nodes.label: AI competence for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI has worked well numerous times on mundane simple tasks like generating a sample draft

nodes.label: Efficiency and time management
nodes.grounding_span: the time I'm provided to solve the problem is not sufficient for me to solve it without the help of AI

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write my own emails and only use AI to help with grammar and punctuation but not the content

nodes.label: Reliable problem resolution
nodes.grounding_span: I usually feel more frustrated than satisfied when using AI at work to solve a niche problem

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for simple tasks

nodes.label: Preference for personal voice in emails
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to write my own emails and only use AI to help with grammar and punctuation but not the content

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI future
nodes.grounding_span: I hope the AI gets smarter so I can rely on it more

nodes.label: Iterative testing and refinement approach
nodes.grounding_span: I would do this multiple times to get the AI's solution to work
